entry.data:
MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A 20 PERCENT CHANCE OF SHOWERS
COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 60S
TEMPERATURE FALLING INTO THE UPPER 50S LATE
NORTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN CLEARING
MUCH COOLER WITH LOWS AROUND 40
NORTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS AROUND 60
NORTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S
NORTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH, BECOMING WEST AFTER MIDNIGHT

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S
NORTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S
HIGHS IN THE MID 50S

PARTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
LOWS IN THE MID 50S

PARTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S
